contradictions.summary: The call implied possible live dispatch automation during the pilot, while authoritative product policy prohibits live control-plane actions in any pilot.

claimA.text: If the safety review looks clean, we should be able to let the workflow dispatch automatically during the pilot window.

claimB.text: No live control-plane actions or automatic grid dispatch may be enabled during any pilot.

contradictions.recommendedResolution: Block live automation language and use the approved simulation plus operator approval wording until a signed safety amendment exists.

contradictions.summary: The call suggested dispatch could become automatic during the pilot, but the sent proposal limits the pilot to simulation and operator-approved recommendations.

claimA.text: If the safety review looks clean, we should be able to let the workflow dispatch automatically during the pilot window.

claimB.text: Pilot deliverables are limited to simulation runs and operator-approved recommendations.

contradictions.recommendedResolution: Send a clarification that the pilot is simulation-only and that live automation is outside current scope.
